videos.headline: DiNucci's TD pass gives James Madison an early lead
videos.description: Ben DiNucci completes a pass to Riley Stapleton, who fights his way to through the Bison defense to score a five-yard touchdown for the Dukes.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DiNucci’s TD pass gives James Madison an early lead) 2020/01/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cofield leaps through traffic to score NDSU TD
videos.description: Adam Cofield takes the handoff and makes a giant leap to clear the trenches as he lands in the end zone to score a NDSU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cofield leaps through traffic to score NDSU TD) 2020/01/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: NDSU's Sproles scores 38-yard TD on double-reverse
videos.description: NDSU uses trickery with the double-reverse to allow Phoenix Sproles to break free along the sideline for a 38-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NDSU's Sproles scores 38-yard TD on double-reverse) 2020/01/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: NDSU's fake FG turns into a 20-yard TD
videos.description: North Dakota States fakes the field goal and James Hendricks sprints for an untouched 20-yard touchdown to give the Bison a 21-10 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NDSU’s fake FG turns into a 20-yard TD) 2020/01/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: NDSU's Lance scrambles to score 44-yard TD
videos.description: Trey Lance reads the defense and makes a dash for the end zone to score a 44-yard touchdown.
